Questions? We Have Answers.

Can't find what you're looking for? Drop us a line and we will get back to you within 24 hours.

Bold Bar is a performance protein bar made with 12 real-food ingredients. Each bar delivers 20g of complete protein and 100mg of natural caffeine from coffee and coffee fruit extract, sweetened only with raw honey and date syrup.

Each bar contains 100mg of natural caffeine, roughly equivalent to a strong cup of coffee. The caffeine comes from real coffee and coffee fruit extract for smooth, sustained energy.

We use raw unfiltered honey and date syrup. No sugar alcohols, no stevia, no sucralose, and no artificial sweeteners of any kind.

Yes. Bold Bar is OUD Kosher certified and gluten free.

Preorders ship Q2 2025. You will receive a tracking notification as soon as your order is on its way. Free shipping on all orders over $50.

Bold Bar contains tree nuts (almonds), milk, and wheat-adjacent ingredients (dairy protein crisps). It is certified gluten free. Manufactured in a facility that also processes peanuts, soy, and eggs.
